items.title: CVE-2026-36786: Shenzhen Tenda Technology Co., Ltd Tenda FH451 V1.0.0.9 was discovered to contain a stack overflow in the list1 paramete
items.description: Shenzhen Tenda Technology Co., Ltd Tenda FH451 V1.0.0.9 was discovered to contain a stack overflow in the list1 parameter of the fromDhcpListClient function. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted HTTP request.

// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-36786 — Anomalous Activity Detection

| order by TimeGenerated desc

items.title: PhoenixStorybook: Unauthenticated remote code execution via HEEx template injection in phoenix_storybook playground
items.description:
### Summary
An unsafe HEEx template generation vulnerability allows any unauthenticated user to execute arbitrary code on the server. The phoenix_storybook playground accepts user-controlled attribute values over WebSocket and interpolates them unsanitized into a HEEx template that is subsequently compiled and evaluated with full Elixir `Kernel` access.

### Details
The vulnerability is a three-step chain:

**1. Unsanitized WebSocket input (`extra_assigns_helpers.ex`)**
The `psb-assign` event handler in `PhoenixStorybook.Story.PlaygroundPreviewLive` accepts arbitrary attribute names and values from unauthenticated WebSocket clients and stores them verbatim via `ExtraAssignsHelpers.handle_set_variation_assign/3`.

**2. Unescaped interpolation into HEEx (`component_renderer.ex`)**
`Componen

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — PhoenixStorybook Unauthenticated remote code execution via HEEx template injecti
id: a8c4723b-3fef-5881-bdaf-0b39c54a10c9
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-8467 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8467
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/10
modified: 2026/06/10
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-8467 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-10T08:32:57Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-8467", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-8467 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5752269; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-10, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: CVE-2026-46442: Flowise is a drag & drop user interface to build a customized large language model flow. Prior to version 3.1.2, POST /a
items.description: Flowise is a drag & drop user interface to build a customized large language model flow. Prior to version 3.1.2, POST /api/v1/node-custom-function lacks route-level authorization, allowing any authenticated user or API key to submit arbitrary JavaScript to the Custom JS Function node. When E2B_APIKEY is not configured the common deployment case Flowise executes this code inside a NodeVM sandbox. This sandbox can be escaped, allowing an attacker to reach the host process object and execute system commands via child_process. The result is authenticated remote code execution on the Flowise server host. This issue has been patched in version 3.1.2.

items.title: Everest Forms Pro WordPress Flaw is Handing Attackers Admin Access
items.description: Hackers exploit CVE-2026-3300 in Everest Forms Pro to inject PHP via form fields, creating rogue admin accounts. 29,300 attempts blocked. Researcher h0xilo submitted a flaw in Everest Forms Pro for WordPress, tracked as CVE-2026-3300, to Wordfence’s bug bounty program and earned $325 for it. WPEverest patched the flaw on March 18. items.title: CVE-2026-11528: A vulnerability was found in Tenda AC18 15.03.05.05. The affected element is the function sub_45304 of the file /goform/
items.description: A vulnerability was found in Tenda AC18 15.03.05.05. The affected element is the function sub_45304 of the file /goform/getRebootStatus of the component Web Management Interface. The manipulation of the argument callback results in stack-based buffer overflow. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used.

items.title: CVE-2026-11524: A vulnerability has been found in Tenda W20E 15.11.0.6. Impacted is the function modifyWifiFilterRules of the file /gofo
items.description: A vulnerability has been found in Tenda W20E 15.11.0.6. Impacted is the function modifyWifiFilterRules of the file /goform/modifyWifiFilterRules of the component Web Management Interface. The manipulation of the argument wifiFilterListRemark leads to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

items.title: Google fixes the fifth actively exploited Chrome zero-day of 2026
items.description: Google fixed a new Chrome zero-day, tracked as CVE-2026-11645, in the V8 JavaScript engine, which is already being exploited in the wild. Google released emergency updates to address a new Chrome zero-day vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-11645, that has been exploited in the wild. This flaw is the fifth Chrome zero-day that is being exploited in […]
